purpose: Transparent mannequin placement assets for lock-start-frame / mannequin mode. Generate via Imagine skill; post-process with npm run stock:process-mannequin-mode.

male.subject: Matte gray male display mannequin with sculpted facial features — defined eye sockets, brows, nose, lips, and chin. Side-parted combed hair.
male.wardrobe: Smooth sculpted gray dress shirt with collar and button placket, sculpted chino pants, sculpted belt with visible buckle, sculpted dress shoes — unified matte gray hard-surface sculpt, minimal folds only, no fabric colors or realistic skin.
male.standardPose: Neutral standing pose, facing camera, arms relaxed naturally at sides, hands at thigh level — no raised arms, no gestures.

female.subject: Matte gray female display mannequin with sculpted facial features, clean bob hairstyle.
female.wardrobe: Sculpted blouse with collar, sculpted skirt, sculpted flats — unified matte gray hard-surface sculpt matching male mannequin material, no fabric colors or realistic skin.
female.standardPose: Neutral standing pose, facing camera, arms relaxed naturally at sides, hands at thigh level — no raised arms, no gestures.

conventions.framing: Full shot head to toe: entire standing body fills about 90% of tall frame height. Tiny headroom and footroom — shoes near bottom edge, hair near top edge.
conventions.studio: Neutral gray seamless studio backdrop, soft even studio lighting, cinematic 35mm photographic look, dark desaturated muted tones.
conventions.noText: Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, or signage.

samples.prompt: Full-body matte gray male display mannequin on neutral gray seamless studio backdrop. Sculpted face with side-parted hair. Gray dress shirt with collar and buttons, chino pants, belt with buckle, dress shoes — unified matte gray hard-surface sculpt. Facing camera directly, arms at sides. Full shot head to toe filling 90% of tall frame. Soft even studio lighting, cinematic 35mm look. No text or logos. Vertical 9:16 portrait.

Full-body matte gray male display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Same identity: side-parted hair, gray dress shirt, chino pants, belt, dress shoes. Three-quarter left view: body turned 45° toward camera-left, both eyes partially visible. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. Soft studio lighting. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body matte gray male display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Same identity: side-parted hair, gray dress shirt, chino pants, belt, dress shoes. Three-quarter right view: body turned 45° toward camera-right, both eyes partially visible. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. Soft studio lighting. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body matte gray male display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Same wardrobe. Pure left profile: turned 90°, camera sees left side only, nose and ear in profile. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body matte gray male display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Same wardrobe. Pure right profile: turned 90°, camera sees right side only. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body matte gray male display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Same identity: side-parted hair, gray dress shirt, chino pants, belt, dress shoes. Rear three-quarter left view: body turned ~135° so camera sees back-left of head and torso — mostly back of head and left ear, slight left cheek, back of shirt and left shoulder. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body matte gray male display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Back view: facing away, back of head with side-parted hair, back of shirt, belt, pants, shoes visible. No face. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body matte gray male display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Same identity: side-parted hair, gray dress shirt, chino pants, belt, dress shoes. Rear three-quarter right view: body turned ~225° so camera sees back-right of head and torso — mostly back of head and right ear, slight right cheek, back of shirt and right shoulder. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body matte gray female display mannequin on neutral gray seamless studio backdrop. Sculpted face with clean bob hairstyle. Sculpted blouse with collar, sculpted skirt, sculpted flats — unified matte gray hard-surface sculpt. Facing camera directly, arms at sides. Full shot head to toe filling 90% of tall frame. Full-body matte gray female display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Same identity: bob hair, blouse, skirt, flats. Three-quarter left view: body turned 45° toward camera-left. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body matte gray female display mannequin on neutral gray studio. Same wardrobe. Pure left profile: turned 90°, bob hair and blouse from side. Arms at sides. Full shot head to toe. No text. Vertical 9:16.

Full-body Matte gray female display mannequin with sculpted facial features, clean bob hairstyle. Sculpted blouse with collar, sculpted skirt, sculpted flats — unified matte gray hard-surface sculpt.
